"'''Descent'''" was a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story from ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 4]]''.

==Plot summary==
Shortly after [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was executed, [[Triton Squad]] was given a new order: destroy the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]. Approaching a group of elders and pups, the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] were met with an unpleasant surprise as [[Tarfful/Legends|Tarfful]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] swooped down with a team of warriors. Engaging in ferocious combat, the Wookiee team soon dropped down into the [[Shadowlands/Legends|Shadowlands]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], leaving Triton Squad to follow. Setting a maze of traps involving local flora and fauna, the Wookiees soon narrowed the squad down to a few troopers, quickly dispatched by an ambush. After the carnage, Chewbacca and Tarfful remarked on how there would be many more battles to come.
